news.headline: EpilepsyGTx Partners with ClearPoint Neuro to Support Targeted Delivery of Lead Gene Therapy in Epilepsy
news.summary: EpilepsyGTx will use ClearPoint's SmartFlow Cannula and Navigation System to deliver its gene therapy candidate EPY201 in an upcoming first-in-human Phase 1/2a trial for focal refractory epilepsy, expected to start in the UK/Europe by end of 2026.

news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro Stock Surges on Partner uniQure's Favorable FDA Path for Huntington's Gene Therapy
news.summary: CLPT shares jumped roughly 26-50% after partner uniQure said the FDA agreed that 3-year Phase I/II data for AMT-130 (delivered via ClearPoint's navigation platform and SmartFlow cannula) can support a BLA for accelerated approval, with submission planned for Q3 2026.

news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro Enters into 10-Year Focused Ultrasound Development Partnership with Sungkyunkwan University, South Korea
news.summary: ClearPoint agreed to a decade-long R&D collaboration with Sungkyunkwan University's SONOCARELAB after demonstrating blood-brain-barrier tracer delivery in a preclinical model, extending its drug-delivery ecosystem into focused ultrasound.

news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
news.summary: Q1 2026 revenue grew 43% year-over-year to $12.1 million (including $2.3 million of IRRAflow revenue) with 64% gross margin, and the company reaffirmed full-year 2026 revenue guidance of $52-56 million.

news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro Announces CE Marking of Velocity Alpha MR High Speed Surgical Drill System
news.summary: The Velocity Alpha MR high-speed surgical drill, previously FDA-cleared in the U.S., received CE Marking, expanding its commercial availability into European markets as part of ClearPoint's broader drug-delivery ecosystem.

catalysts.label: uniQure BLA submission for AMT-130
catalysts.detail: Partner uniQure plans to file a Biologics License Application with the FDA for AMT-130 (Huntington's disease gene therapy delivered via ClearPoint's navigation platform and SmartFlow cannula) using 3-year Phase I/II data, following supportive Type B FDA meeting feedback in June 2026.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings report
catalysts.detail: ClearPoint Neuro is expected to report second-quarter 2026 financial results, consistent with prior-year timing (Q2 2025 was reported August 12, 2025); the company had not formally announced the date as of mid-July 2026.

catalysts.label: EpilepsyGTx first-in-human trial start
catalysts.detail: EpilepsyGTx plans to begin a first-in-human Phase 1/2a trial of EPY201 for focal refractory epilepsy in the UK/Europe using ClearPoint's SmartFlow Cannula and Navigation System, enrolling up to 30 adults.

catalysts.label: IRRAS integration synergies / reduced cash burn
catalysts.detail: Company guidance calls for cost synergies from the IRRAS acquisition to begin reducing cash burn in H2 2026, supporting the path to the $52-56 million full-year revenue target.

pulse: ClearPoint Neuro's momentum builds around its partners' pipelines: uniQure's supportive June FDA feedback on AMT-130 (delivered via ClearPoint's platform) drove a sharp CLPT rally and sets up a targeted Q3 2026 BLA filing, while a new EpilepsyGTx delivery partnership and a 10-year focused-ultrasound R&D deal with Sungkyunkwan University broaden the drug-delivery ecosystem. Underlying fundamentals are improving too, with Q1 2026 revenue up 43% to $12.1 million and full-year guidance of $52-56 million reaffirmed as IRRAS integration progresses. The stock remains high-beta and partner-dependent, with the next major checkpoints being ClearPoint's own Q2 2026 earnings (expected mid-August) and further clarity on uniQure's BLA timeline.
